methods.description: Detailed outcrop analyses of formations on the Boso Peninsula, Japan, to establish depositional processes and environments based on facies analysis.

steps.description: Conduct detailed descriptions and interpretations of lithofacies features.

methods.description: Analysis of vertical changes in grain sizes within sandstone beds using a laser diffraction grain size analyzer.

steps.description: Analyze vertical changes in grain sizes using a laser diffraction grain size analyzer (Malvern Mastersizer 3000) at Niigata University, Japan.

methods.description: Sequence-stratigraphic analyses of formations to assess spatial and temporal variations in sediment delivery beyond the shelf margin.
